1
" … (475) develops the perception of impermanence … (476) develops the perception of non-self …
(477) develops the perception of death … (478) develops the perception of the repulsiveness of food … (479) develops the perception of non-delight in the entire world … (480) develops the perception of a skeleton … (481) develops the perception of a worm-infested corpse … (482) develops the perception of a livid corpse … (483) develops the perception of a fissured corpse … (484) develops the perception of a bloated corpse … "
